comment: Patch-specific overrides for card values and localization text. Each key is a patchIndex (integer as string) corresponding to the entry in patchList.json. All fields are relative to the CURRENT patch baseline (cardValues.json / gameData.json). Only include fields that DIFFER from the current patch. Populate this file whenever old game files are available for extraction.

cards.arsenal.description: Whenever you play a Colorless card, gain {ArsenalPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
cards.begone.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Dive Bomb+|Minion Dive Bomb}[/gold].
cards.blade_of_ink.description: This turn, whenever you play an Attack, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
cards.bombardment.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of your turn, plays from the [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
cards.burst.description: This turn, your next{IfUpgraded:show: 2} {Skills:plural:Skill is|Skills are} played an extra time.
cards.charge.description:
Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into
[gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Strike+|Minion Strike}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Strikes+|Minion Strikes}[/gold]}.
cards.cinder.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
cards.deprecated_card.description: This card has been removed from the game.
cards.discovery.description: Choose 1 of 3 random cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
cards.dominate.description: Gain {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on the enemy.
cards.expect_a_fight.description:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold].{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()}.)|}
cards.flanking.description: The enemy takes double damage from other players this turn.
cards.follow_through.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If the last card you played this turn was a Skill, apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
cards.grapple.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, deal {GrapplePower:diff()} damage to the enemy.
cards.grapple.title: Grapple
cards.grave_warden.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Soul+|Soul}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
cards.hidden_gem.description: A random card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()}.
cards.howl_from_beyond.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
At the start of your turn, plays from the [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
cards.iteration.description: The first time you draw a Status card each turn, draw {IterationPower:diff()} {IterationPower:plural:card|cards}.
cards.mad_science.description:
{CardType:choose(Attack|Skill|Power):Deal {Damage:diff()} damage{Violence: {ViolenceHits:diff()} times|}.|Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].|}{HasRider:{Sapping:
Apply {SappingWeak:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Apply {SappingVulnerable:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].|}{Choking:
Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses {ChokingDamage:diff()} HP.|}{Energized:
Gain {EnergizedEnergy:energyIcons()}.|}{Wisdom:
Draw {WisdomCards:diff()} cards.|}{Chaos:
Add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.|}{Expertise:Gain {ExpertiseStrength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain {ExpertiseDexterity:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].|}{Curious:Powers cost {CuriousReduction:diff()} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less.|}{Improvement:At the end of combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.|}|{CardType:choose(Attack|Skill|Power):
???|
???|???}}
cards.rocket_punch.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
When a Status card is created, reduce this card's cost to 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
cards.seance.description: Transform a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Soul+|Soul}[/gold].
cards.shiny_strike.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Lower the cost of {Cards:diff()} Colorless {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your hand by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
cards.shiny_strike.title: Shiny Strike
cards.spite.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you lost HP this turn, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
cards.stack.description:
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +{CalculationBase}|}.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].)|}
cards.stoke.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Draw a card for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
cards.sword_sage.description: Increase the cost of [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] by 1. [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] now hits an additional time.
cards.trash_to_treasure.description: Whenever you create a Status card, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 random Orb.

relics.archaic_tooth.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] into [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|a starter card with an ancient version}.
relics.archaic_tooth.eventdescription: [gold]Transform[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] into [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|a starter card with an ancient version}.
relics.crossbow.description: At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Attack[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
relics.distinguished_cape.description: Upon pickup, lose [red]9[/red] Max HP. Add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Apparition|Apparitions}[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relics.fragrant_mushroom.description: Upon pickup, lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
relics.lizard_tail.description: When you would die, heal to [green]{Heal}%[/green] of your Max HP instead (works once).
relics.massive_scroll.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Multiplayer Colorless Cards[/gold] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relics.massive_scroll.eventdescription: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Multiplayer Colorless Cards[/gold] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
relics.medical_kit.description: [gold]Status[/gold] cards can now be played. Playing a Status will [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the card.
relics.medical_kit.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
relics.medical_kit.title: Medical Kit
relics.pendulum.description: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], draw a card.
relics.precarious_shears.description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold] and take [red]{Damage}[/red] damage.
relics.regalite.description: Whenever you create a Colorless card, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
relics.stone_cracker.description: At the start of [gold]Boss[/gold] combats, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] for the rest of combat.
relics.tiny_mailbox.additionalrestsitehealtext: Procure a random potion from Tiny Mailbox.
relics.tiny_mailbox.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], procure a random potion.
relics.vexing_puzzlebox.description: At the start of each combat, add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

enchantments.favored.description: This card's attack damage is doubled.
enchantments.favored.title: Favored
enchantments.instinct.description: Decrease the cost of this card by [blue]1[/blue].
